details.n: You Can't Be in a Rom-Com with Your Childhood Friends!

ratings.en: Road to School? Indirect Kiss? Butt on Lap? Still Won't Start a Rom-Com
Full Bus? Drenched in Rain? Feelings Exposed? Admiring Them? Still Won't Start a Rom-Com
Admiring Them? Feeling Lonely? School at Night? Fantasizing? Old Promises? Still Won't Start a Rom-Com
Since I'm the Big Brother to the Little-Sister Type, Growing up Still Won't Start a Rom-Com
Extra Extra Hot? Finals Done? Bath Scene? Things Will Never Change? Still Won't Start a Rom-Com
Summer Beach? Looking Away? Spent the Night? Still Won't Start a Rom-Com
Relationship Talk? Sharing Half? Festival Vibes? Still Won't Start a Rom-Com
Kept Running and Missed the Fireworks? Since It Matters Too Much, It Still Won't Start a Rom-Com
An Unfamiliar Girl Who's Your Guy Friend? But if You Laugh, It Still Won't Start a Rom-Com
Feeling the Afterglow Kiss After Kiss? Become a Sports Day Committee Member? Still Won't Start a Rom-Com
